description: Style noteThis kurta by diva is designed to accentuate your femininity, combining traditional prints with a modern silhouette. Look stylish in this ethnic kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and flats for an off-duty lookProduct detailsWhite and black printed kurta with sequined mock chest placket, has a round neck with a split neckline, short sleeves, traditional grey and silver ethnic artwork Material and careBlended fabricDry clean onlySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8& rdquo and chest 33& rdquo ) is wearing size S
